beats.dialogue: none

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: # The Bite of the Raptor Prologue The Bite of the Raptor  The tropical rain fell in drenching sheets, hammering the corrugated roof of the clinic building, roaring down the metal gutters, splashing on the ground in a torrent.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: none

image.prompt_description: none

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Roberta Carter sighed, and stared out the window. From the clinic, she could hardly see the beach or the ocean beyond, cloaked in low fog.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: This wasn't what she had expected when she had come to the fishing village of Bahía Anasco, on the west coast of Costa Rica, to spend two months as a visiting physician.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Bobbie Carter had expected sun and relaxation, after two grueling years of residency in emergency medicine at Michael Reese in Chicago.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: She had been in Bahía Anasco now for three weeks. And it had rained every day.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Everything else was fine. She liked the isolation of Bahía Anasco, and the friendliness of its people.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: none

image.prompt_description: none

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Costa Rica had one of the twenty best medical systems in the world, and even in this remote coastal village, the clinic was well maintained, amply supplied.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Her paramedic, Manuel Arag6n, was intelligent and well trained. Bobbie was able to practice a level of medicine equal to what she had practiced in Chicago.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: But the rain! The constant, unending rain!

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Across the examining room, Manuel cocked his head. "Listen," he said.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: "Believe me, I hear it," Bobbie said. Listen." And then she caught it, another sound blended with the rain, a deeper rumble that built and emerged until it was clear: the rhythmic thumping of a helicopter.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: none

image.prompt_description: none

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: She thought, They can't be flying in weather like this. But the sound built steadily, and then the helicopter burst low through the ocean fog and roared overhead, circled, and came back.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: She saw the helicopter swing back over the water, near the fishing boats, then case sideways to the rickety wooden dock, and back toward the beach.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: It was looking for a place to land. It was a big-bellied Sikorsky with a blue stripe on the side, with the words "InGen Construction." That was the name of the construction company building a new resort on one of the offshore islands.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: The resort was said to be spectacular, and very complicated; many of the local people were employed in the construction, which had been going on for more than two years.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Bobbie could imagine it-one of those huge American resorts with swimming pools and tennis courts, where guests could play and drink their daiquiris without having any contact with the real life of the country.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: none

image.prompt_description: none

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Bobbie wondered what was so urgent on that island that the helicopter would fly in this weather. Through the windshield she saw the pilot exhale in relief as the helicopter settled onto the wet sand of the beach.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: Uniformed men jumped out, and flung open the big side door. She heard frantic shouts in Spanish, and Manuel nudged her.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.title: none
beats.dialogue: They were calling for a doctor. Two black crewmen carried a limp body toward her, while a white man barked orders.

image.prompt_description: A dark, moody shot matching the narration.

beats.dialogue: We've got a very sick man here, doctor." "Then you better take him to San Jose," she said. San Jose was the capital, just twenty minutes away by air.
